metadata.title: Beverage Distributor | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered beverage distribution and liquor store management platform for all your operations — from point of sale and inventory management to B2B/B2C eCommerce and bottle return workflows.

hero.preHeading: All you need to digitize your
hero.title: 🍺 Liquor Store
hero.description: AdonERP allows you to manage the entire sales cycle of your beverage distribution business, from inventory to point of sale, custom features, craft drinks and bottle returns.
hero.testimonialQuote: The processing time for accounting documents prior to analysis is now reduced from 2 days to only 5 hours, allowing us to focus on reporting and counseling.

posSection.title: PoS optimized for
posSection.description: Run a beverage store with B2B pricelists, multiple packaging, fast product creation, consignments, and bottle return workflows.

ecommerceSection.title: B2B and
ecommerceSection.description: Restaurants and cafés work with your B2B account, while customers can browse products, pick up in store, or order delivery.

inventorySection.title: Modern
inventorySection.description: Receive, store and deliver faster with barcode scanning. Buy pallets, sell by boxes, and handle packaging smoothly.

accountingSection.title: Integrated Accounting
accountingSection.description: Imagine having all your data in real-time, from inventory to sales. Everything becomes easier with inventory valuation, customer statements, and more.

featuresSection.title: All the features
featuresSection.subtitle: done right.
featuresSection.description: Smart tools for beverage retail, inventory management, logistics, events, team management, and customer loyalty.

list.title: Easy Material renting
list.description: Manage keg and equipment rentals for events and bars with ease.

list.title: HR Apps
list.description: Track employee schedules, payroll, and performance from one place.

list.title: Organize Events
list.description: Plan tastings, launches, and promotions directly from your platform.

list.title: Marketing Apps
list.description: Launch email campaigns and loyalty programs to boost repeat business.

list.title: Transport Management System
list.description: Optimize delivery routes and manage fleet operations efficiently.

list.title: Customer Loyalty tools
list.description: Reward repeat customers with points, discounts, and exclusive offers.

appsSection.title: One need, one app.
appsSection.description: Expand as you grow with connected apps for your beverage distribution operation, inventory, logistics, and customer management.

testimonials.name: Marco Rossi
testimonials.content: The processing time for accounting documents prior to analysis is now reduced from 2 days to only 5 hours, allowing us to focus on reporting and counseling.

testimonials.name: Lisa Chen
testimonials.content: AdonERP transformed our beverage distribution. From keg tracking to B2B ordering, everything runs smoothly. Our customers love the online shop.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million happy users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with AdonERP — the complete solution for beverage distributors and liquor stores.

footerCta.title: The #1 Brewery
footerCta.subtitle: and liquor store apps
footerCta.description: Launch a beverage distribution workflow that helps you manage inventory, streamline B2B/B2C sales, and scale from one location to many.
